target: Vocabulary Engine Phase 2 - Light Theme Colors & Production Mode (AI Writing Evaluation)
summary: All features working correctly. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed for evaluate-sentence API. Frontend: All 4 modes (Learn, Practice, Quiz, Production) verified with correct light theme colors and full functionality.

features_tested.notes: Uses bg-gradient-to-b from-amber-50 to-orange-50/30 - warm cream/amber background CORRECT
Uses bg-gradient-to-b from-emerald-50 to-teal-50/30 - green/teal light background CORRECT
Uses bg-gradient-to-b from-purple-50 to-pink-50/30 - purple/pink light background CORRECT
Uses bg-gradient-to-b from-indigo-50 to-blue-50/30. Shows target word card with meaning, textarea, 'Evaluate with AI' button. 8 advanced terms per module.
Returns JSON with grammar_correct, word_usage_correct, overall_score (1-5), feedback, improved_sentence, tip. Uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key. Response time ~3-5 seconds.
Shows 1-5 stars (amber), Grammar indicator (green/red), Word Usage indicator (green/red), feedback text, improved sentence (emerald box), tip (amber box)
'Interactive Vocabulary Engine' section has both 'Start Learning' (amber button) and 'AI Writing' (outlined button with PenTool icon) CTAs

features_tested.feature: Production Mode Flow: word → write → evaluate → next
features_tested.notes: Full flow tested: displays word 1/8, user writes sentence, clicks evaluate, receives AI feedback with score/grammar/usage indicators, clicks 'Next Word' button

context_for_next_testing_agent: Vocabulary Engine Phase 2 fully tested. Production Mode at /vocabulary/production/:moduleId shows 8 advanced terms, user writes sentences using each word, AI evaluates for grammar and word usage. Navigate via AdvancedMasteryCourse > Module > Vocabulary section > 'AI Writing' button. All light theme colors verified: Learn=amber/orange, Practice=emerald/teal, Quiz=purple/pink, Production=indigo/blue.
